title: exochogyne steyermarkii
intro: Exochogyne steyermarkii is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Exochogyne steyermarkii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Exochogyne steyermarkii can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
